title: E2E: Full trading validation (testnet)
description: Runs trading lifecycle and limit order scenarios with different coins, sides, and parameters against HyperLiquid testnet.

btc-long-tpsl.cmd: cd packages/perps-controller && npx tsx e2e/trading-lifecycle.ts --coin BTC --size 0.001 --leverage 5 --side long --tp-pct 5 --sl-pct 3 2>&1

eth-short-tpsl.cmd: cd packages/perps-controller && npx tsx e2e/trading-lifecycle.ts --coin ETH --size 0.01 --leverage 3 --side short --tp-pct 10 --sl-pct 5 2>&1

btc-long-no-tpsl.cmd: cd packages/perps-controller && npx tsx e2e/trading-lifecycle.ts --coin BTC --size 0.0001 --leverage 10 --side long 2>&1
btc-long-no-tpsl.intent: BTC long minimal size, no TP/SL

limit-btc-buy.cmd: cd packages/perps-controller && npx tsx e2e/limit-orders.ts --coin BTC --size 0.001 --offset-pct -2 --leverage 5 --side long 2>&1

limit-eth-sell.cmd: cd packages/perps-controller && npx tsx e2e/limit-orders.ts --coin ETH --size 0.01 --offset-pct 3 --leverage 3 --side short 2>&1
